question: What are sale prices of books written by Plato?
sql: SELECT Book.SalePrice FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor WHERE Author.Name = 'Plato';

semantic.reason: 原始问题询问Plato所著书籍的销售价格，SQL描述准确匹配了目标表(Book)、列(SalePrice)和过滤条件(Author='Plato')，未包含任何额外的聚合、分组或排序要求，与问题语义完全一致。
